data.body: SHADOW VALIDATION accruing — baseline_dual_write live (change 437 merged). Post-437 reconcile-bridge runs: (a) SEED pass 29044278873 @19:25 divergent=1 equal=0 seeded=834 (first-ever baseline write; the lone divergent was a transient seed artifact); (b) FIRST COMPARISON pass 29044759149 @19:33 -> divergent=0 equal=835 seeded=0 — CLEAN: all 835 bindings arbitrate identically baseline-vs-prev_snapshot. The >=10-consecutive-clean-pass streak starts here (streak=1). A background monitor is accruing subsequent divergent=0 run-ids (~8-min bridge cadence). Once >=10 clean, I flip baseline_consumer_swap=true and verify a clean flag-ON pass.
